{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231928155B6B9149BACB15A03316"}"},"total":3303},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610050190911849240","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这文真的超级好看，女主一开始打职业不是因为热爱，后来她自己也没发现自己已经爱上这里的热血这里的人和事。所以我觉得她遇到挫折也很正常，这样她才能够成长。女主真的很厉害技术很强，别看简介说是恋爱脑就退了，女主真的很开朗很豁达很活泼很可爱，是很可爱的人，她喜欢男主，但没有那种恋爱脑不可救药的情结！！超好看的！写的很真实很好看哦。^^我已经二刷了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771856170,"group_id":"7195813891119516706","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwgkXCziUbFKKbeFV/izcCFRzcf/SDCeSTKU+8GdRbc8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e111e5c63583443783ab21afdc05327b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794155&x-signature=VTeeg0p0AnUyYJ%2BxiAm%2BEzjohD4%3D","user_id":"2928722812076268","user_name":"看女频别挑女主刺"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2928722812076268","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7195813891119516706","book_info":{"abstract":"【女主：职业选手，直球，喷子，喜剧人，恋爱脑】
【男主：退役选手，教练，貌美，脸皮薄，隐性恋爱脑】
电竞文，游戏背景架空，男女主年龄差。
注：开书的时候标签设定有点问题，本文女频，言情向，有一丢丢同性情节，接受不了女主犯错的慎入。
陈空（empty），电竞圈知名喷子女主播，文能挂机一骂九，武能越塔一打五，人美操作秀，可惜长了张嘴。
“磕俩响头看看多孝。”
“父子局，敢不敢来？”
“看好了，爹给你们整个弟弟。”
“这俩选手谁厉害？都没我厉害。”
XS某人：我求你来打职业
陈空：爹不去
TUG宋时：来打职业吗？
陈空：去，立刻去。
后来，TUG战队官宣了自己的新上单。
粉丝：？？？
传下去，TUG缺上单缺疯了绑架我闺女
再后来，赛前采访，陈空掰着手指头认真数：“这个被我打哭过，那个也被我打哭过。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob6112a92b1a609f871fbbf2bfb0b7c43~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"青意","author_id":"","book_id":"7195813891119516706","book_name":"电竞：喷子女主播打职业很合理吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9320人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":749,"name":"青春甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749&name=青春甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7195814112603931173","read_count":"9320","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"280295"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"131","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,直播,电竞","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob6112a92b1a609f871fbbf2bfb0b7c43~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449295&x-signature=Aw7TX7Jz6jbQ0zohrP%2BCzxdttXU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"659341564721485","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"175"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231928155B6B9149BACB15A03316"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":27632,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":248},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7211147536731161405","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错的小短篇，剧情紧凑不拖沓，女主人设非常nice。不适合咬文嚼字细究细节的阅读，适合整体上的故事性阅读，里面的骚话也很鲜活比较有趣，能让人比较放松的不知不觉的读下去！不错的电子榨菜"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1678976248,"group_id":"7195813891119516706","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N34XWDOzdgRifgAg30BJIHq6tB4kPDBNY59We1pzyjnx","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/922076e695814cbf96cf4586c4625d76~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795328&x-signature=PIwChh3hwM7ID47nmCgiahJrb%2B4%3D","user_id":"1794833287751240","user_name":"十二..……"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1794833287751240","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1664239074,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7195813891119516706","book_info":{"abstract":"【女主：职业选手，直球，喷子，喜剧人，恋爱脑】

"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7332120199202390846","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"大大真的好会写，剧情和人物都塑造的很真实，每一个剧情点都有他们存在的价值，小空就像一个太阳一样照亮了宋时和TUG，但人无完人，性格上还是有细微缺陷，所以之后小空在第一次世界赛场上出现的意外恰到好处，这个转折点让小空真正认识到电竞的意义（算是吧，而不是单单为了宋时去拼搏，总之这篇文真的惊艳到我了，文里没有绝对的反派，每个人都在为了达到梦想而努力，这或许就是电竞的魅力吧(°¯᷄◠¯᷅°)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707144959,"group_id":"7195813891119516706","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"⦮_
